title: The Hague, South Holland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to The Hague, South Holland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

The Hague is a city in South Holland with a population of 566,221. The seat of Dutch government and international law, offering a refined coastal lifestyle with a high concentration of expats and diplomats.

Last updated: July 06, 2026
